checks.name: split_overlap_duplicate
checks.recommendation: If non-zero, regenerate splits and deduplicate before fitting.

checks.name: fit_scope_train_only
checks.summary: Verifies learned operators are fit on train split only.
checks.recommendation: Enforce fit-on-train-only for all learned operators.

checks.name: augmentation_scope
checks.summary: No augmentation stage detected in benchmark runner scripts.
checks.recommendation: If augmentation is introduced later, enforce train-only augmentation logging.

checks.name: hyperparameter_tuning_test_reuse
checks.summary: Protocol uses test-guided model selection by design (stress-test baseline).
checks.recommendation: Use validation-only or nested selection for confirmatory evaluation.

checks.name: temporal_group_constraints
checks.summary: Split design declares i.i.d. regime; group/temporal constraints marked not_applicable.

evidence.value: dataset: higgs | rules: |   group_constraint: not_applicable |   temporal_constraint: not_applicable |   i.i.d_assumption: enabled |   deterministic_split: true |

checks.recommendation: For grouped/temporal tasks, require disjoint group/time audits.

checks.name: cache_namespace_isolation
checks.summary: Caching is disabled in benchmark runner scripts; no cross-split cache path detected.
checks.recommendation: If caching is enabled later, enforce split namespace isolation in cache keys.

limitations: Current report audits protocol artifacts; it does not guarantee absence of all semantic contamination.
